---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap this addresses. For example: "I want to add a new service to the cluster but there's no clear pattern for X."

## Proposed solution

How you'd like to see it work. If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Any relevant links, prior art, or context.
